_comment: PC Health Check configuration template. Copy this file to a local config path before adding a secret.
_howto: VirusTotal API key: https://www.virustotal.com -> profile -> API Key

virustotal._note: Only SHA-256 hashes are queried. Files are never uploaded. Prefer the VT_API_KEY environment variable when practical.

sysinternals._note: Sysinternals tools are verified as Microsoft-signed before every execution. autoDownload=false asks before the first download.
